title: Everything You Need to Know About PDF Receipt Generation for Crypto Stores — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Payment confirmed, receipt generated, download link sent — all within 30 seconds. The fully automated digital product pipeline.

content.text: Imagine you're a creator from Nigeria, blocked from using PayPal due to geographic restrictions. You've got an amazing digital product to sell, but every payment processor you try rejects you. This is where Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) and Unchained Commerce come in – we're here to help you get paid and start selling without the hassle of restricted platforms. In this breakdown, we'll dive into the world of PDF receipt generation for crypto stores, and how our technology makes it all possible, no PayPal required.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

A PDF receipt is more than just a nice-to-have – it's a crucial step in building trust with your customers. When someone pays you in cryptocurrency, they need proof that they've made a legitimate transaction. This is where automated PDF receipt generation comes in. It's a seamless process that verifies the payment, generates a receipt, and delivers it to the customer's inbox, all without any manual intervention. This not only saves you time but also ensures a smooth customer experience.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Our Core Shop Engine ($49.99) is the backbone of this process. It's a backend system that automates the entire digital product delivery pipeline, from payment verification to PDF receipt generation. When a customer makes a payment, a webhook is triggered, which sends a notification to our engine. Our engine then verifies the payment, generates a receipt, and delivers it to the customer's inbox. It's a process that happens in real-time, without any human intervention. And with our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) integration, customers can pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, making it easy for everyone to participate.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is specifically designed for creators like you who've been blocked from using traditional payment processors. Whether you're selling ebooks, courses, or digital art, our system makes it easy to get paid and deliver your products to your customers. We're not just a payment processor – we're a complete solution that takes care of everything from payment verification to PDF receipt generation. This means you can focus on what you do best – creating amazing digital products and engaging with your audience.
Automated PDF receipt generation is not just a nicety – it's a necessity for building trust with your customers.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our Admin Dashboard ($29.99) provides real-time analytics and order management, so you can keep track of your sales and customer interactions. Our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) integration makes it easy for customers to pay in multiple cryptocurrencies, and our Core Shop Engine ($49.99) automates the entire digital product delivery pipeline. When you combine these components, you get a seamless and efficient payment system that takes care of everything for you.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know the ins and outs of PDF receipt generation for crypto stores, it's time to take action. Here's what you need to do: set up your Unchained Commerce Shop at https://unchained-commerce.github.io/Shop/index.html, integrate our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) and Core Shop Engine ($49.99) components, and start selling your digital products. Don't worry about payment verification or PDF receipt generation – our system takes care of everything for you. Focus on creating amazing products and engaging with your audience, and let us handle the rest.
How does automated digital product delivery work?

Automated digital delivery works through a webhook — an HTTP notification that NOWPayments sends to your Core Shop Engine endpoint when a payment confirms on-chain. The engine receives the webhook, reads the payment amount and transaction hash from the payload, verifies the amount matches the order total, confirms the transaction hash on the blockchain directly, then generates a PDF receipt and sends a delivery email with a time-limited download link to the buyer's email address. The entire sequence runs server-side with no user interface and no manual steps. It completes in under 30 seconds from payment confirmation in almost all cases. If any step fails, the Admin Dashboard flags the order for manual review so nothing slips through.
Our Core Shop Engine ($49.99) automates the entire digital product delivery pipeline, from payment verification to PDF receipt generation.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more ways to automate your digital product delivery, check out our Full Stack Bundle ($79.99), which includes everything you need to get started. And if you're new to cryptocurrency payments, our Web3 Wallet Connect ($19.99) is a great place to start. With its multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds, you can accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies and give your customers the flexibility they deserve.
Your Action Checklist

Deploy the Core Shop Engine and configure your NOWPayments webhook endpoint URL in your NOWPayments account settings — this is the connection point between payment and delivery. Upload your product files to the configured delivery paths. Set the webhook secret key in both NOWPayments and your engine configuration so the engine can verify that webhooks are legitimate. Test the webhook by completing a real mainnet transaction — confirm in your server logs that the webhook was received, parsed, and processed correctly. Check that the delivery email arrived with a working download link. Open the Admin Dashboard and confirm the transaction appears with correct status. Set up email delivery monitoring — confirm your transactional email service is configured and not sending to spam. Check the Admin Dashboard every day for the first week to confirm orders are processing correctly. After the first week of clean operation, move to checking once every few days for any flagged exceptions.
With Unchained Commerce, you can accept payments in multiple cryptocurrencies and give your customers the flexibility they deserve.
